claims.assertion: ChemWorld implements a typed closed-loop interface that records experiments, measurements, resources and structured decision evidence.
In the retained legacy diagnostic matrix, adaptive optimization improved the declared primary metric on four of six tasks, while electrochemistry and equilibrium remained unresolved.
The vNext evaluator binds reported scores to replayed source records, trajectory bytes, evaluator version and task contracts.
ChemWorld establishes a confirmatory ranking of classical, reinforcement-learning and language-model agents.
Training in ChemWorld improves transfer to unseen virtual or real chemical systems.
Performance in ChemWorld predicts autonomous-agent performance in a physical laboratory.
